data.title: Fermi Secures $165 Million Turbine Equipment Financing Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Fermi Inc. ( (FRMI) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 26, 2026, Fermi’s subsidiary Fermi Turbine Warehouse II LLC entered into a senior secured Equipment Supply Loan Financing Agreement of up to $165 million with Beal Lenders to fund the purchase of six Siemens Energy SGT-800 industrial gas turbines and related equipment for Project Matador. The facility, which runs for 33 months and carries a 12% annual interest rate plus a significant exit fee and unused commitment fee, is backed by first-priority security over the equipment, multiple guaranties from Fermi entities, and a required minimum equity contribution of about $5.5 million, and it imposes tight covenants and mandatory prepayment triggers that could materially influence Fermi’s capital structure, project execution flexibility, and risk profile for lenders and shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (FRMI) stock is a Buy with a $35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fermi Inc. stock, see the FRMI Stock Forecast page.

More about Fermi Inc.

Fermi, Inc., through its indirect wholly owned subsidiaries Fermi Turbine Warehouse II LLC, Fermi Turbine Pledgor II LLC and Fermi Turbine HoldCo II LLC, operates in the energy infrastructure sector with a focus on acquiring and deploying industrial gas turbines. The company is currently concentrating resources on Project Matador, supported by structured equipment supply and financing arrangements.

Average Trading Volume: 7,225,056

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.73B

See more insights into FRMI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: James River Group Highlights Strong Q4 2025 Specialty Performance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

James River Group ( (JRVR) ) just unveiled an update.

In March 2026, James River Group Holdings, Inc. released its fourth quarter 2025 investor presentation, highlighting its positioning as a leading specialty insurer in the U.S. small and medium enterprise E&S market with a wholesale-only distribution model. As of December 31, 2025, the company reported $1.2 billion in gross written premiums over the last twelve months, $4.9 billion in total assets, $538 million in total shareholders’ equity and an A- (Excellent) rating from A.M. Best.

The presentation underscored 2025 results that featured strong underwriting profit, disciplined expenses and profitable growth in shareholder equity, including adjusted net operating income of $16 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, a 15.3% adjusted net operating return on tangible common equity and a 34% increase in tangible common equity per share. Management highlighted de-risking of its fronting business, enhanced reinsurance and legacy protections, upgraded technology platforms and a reorganized E&S leadership team as key drivers supporting its profitability focus and long-term efficiency, with implications for a stronger balance sheet and improved competitive positioning in the specialty insurance market.

The most recent analyst rating on (JRVR) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on James River Group stock, see the JRVR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JRVR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JRVR is a Neutral.

JRVR scores mid-range: the main support is attractive valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield) alongside a positive operational turnaround and upbeat 2026 return guidance. The largest constraint is financial quality, with unstable multi-year profitability and especially weak, inconsistent cash flow that reduces confidence in the sustainability of reported earnings; technicals are also only neutral-to-soft.

To see Spark’s full report on JRVR stock, click here.

More about James River Group

James River Group Holdings, Inc. is a specialty insurance company focused on the U.S. small and medium enterprise excess and surplus (E&S) market, operating through a wholesale-only distribution model. As of December 31, 2025, it reported $1.2 billion in gross written premiums, $4.9 billion in total assets, $538 million in total shareholders’ equity and holds an A- (Excellent) financial strength rating from A.M. Best.

The company emphasizes underwriting discipline, extensive use of reinsurance and legacy protections for older accident years, and a reorganized E&S leadership team with deep industry experience. It has pursued technology upgrades, expense management initiatives and a 2025 redomicile to improve operational efficiency and underwriting performance within its diversified E&S platform.

Average Trading Volume: 266,824

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $289.1M

data.title: Drugs Made In America Signs Financing and Sponsor Deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. ( (DMAA) ) is now available.

On March 23, 2026, Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. issued a $100,000 interim convertible note to BV Advisory Partners, LLC as the first tranche of a contemplated $500,000 financing under a newly signed Investment and Sponsor Transition Agreement. The agreement provides for a second $200,000 tranche within 21 days and additional funding on an as‑needed basis, while granting the investor at least 40% of sponsor‑level economic benefits and the option, but not obligation, to extend financing beyond the initial commitment.

As part of this arrangement, BV Advisory Partners introduced a potential business combination opportunity involving an enterprise technology platform focused on AI, machine learning, quantum analytics, and cybersecurity, consistent with the business of Power Analytics Global Corporation. The SPAC has begun preliminary due diligence on this target, but as of March 23, 2026, no letter of intent, term sheet, or definitive deal has been executed, leaving uncertainty over whether a transaction will ultimately materialize.

More about Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp.

Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company focused on identifying and completing business combinations, rather than producing operating products or services itself. The firm seeks merger or acquisition targets, and its latest activities indicate a strategic interest in enterprise technology platforms spanning artificial intelligence, machine learning, quantum analytics, and cybersecurity, aligning with the profile of Power Analytics Global Corporation.

Average Trading Volume: 82,440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $352.3M

T Mobile US ( (TMUS) ) has issued an update.

On March 26, 2026, T-Mobile US disclosed that Abdurazak Mudesir had informed the Board of Directors of his decision to resign from the Board and from the Nominating, Corporate Governance and Compliance Committee, effective March 31, 2026. The company stated that Mudesir’s departure was not due to any disagreement over T-Mobile’s operations, policies, or practices, suggesting a routine board transition with limited immediate impact on governance stability.

His exit will require T-Mobile to refresh its board and committee composition, which may lead to adjustments in oversight responsibilities and succession planning at the governance level. However, the clarification that there were no underlying disputes or policy conflicts aims to reassure investors and other stakeholders that the resignation does not signal strategic tension or operational concerns within the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (TMUS) stock is a Buy with a $253.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on T Mobile US stock, see the TMUS Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TMUS is a Outperform.

TMUS scores well primarily on improving financial performance (stronger profitability and much stronger operating/free cash flow), supported by a positive guidance and shareholder-return outlook from the latest earnings call. The score is held back by elevated leverage and a valuation that is not especially cheap, while technicals are generally favorable but still below the 200-day moving average.

To see Spark’s full report on TMUS stock, click here.

More about T Mobile US

data.title: Kopin Delays 2025 Annual Report Filing
data.description:
Kopin ( (KOPN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kopin Corporation has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 27, 2025. The company says the delay applies specifically to the 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not to its other required SEC filings.

Management explains the holdup stems from complex financing transactions completed in the fourth quarter involving third-party investments in Kopin Corporation. These deals raise challenging U.S. GAAP questions around how to recognize, measure, and present the arrangements, requiring more technical work and valuation analysis.

Because of these accounting complexities, Kopin needs extra time to finalize its financial statements and related disclosures tied to the new transactions. The company emphasizes that filing on time would have required unreasonable effort or expense under the current circumstances.

Kopin currently expects to submit its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard fifteen-calendar-day extension allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25. Investors should note that this timing is an expectation, not a guarantee, and could shift if the accounting work takes longer than planned.

The company also warns that it anticipates a significant change in full-year 2025 results compared with the prior year, largely driven by the fourth-quarter financing transactions and the deconsolidation of one of its entities. These moves are expected to affect reported gains or losses and alter the presentation of Kopin’s financials after the deconsolidation.

These forward-looking statements about timing and financial impact are subject to risks and uncertainties, including the completion of the remaining accounting and reporting work. Kopin states it remains focused on meeting its reporting obligations, and the notification is signed by Treasurer and Chief Financial Officer Erich Manz on March 27, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for compliance.

The most recent analyst rating on (KOPN) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kopin stock, see the KOPN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KOPN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KOPN is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by continued losses and ongoing cash burn, despite a low-leverage balance sheet and improving margins. Technicals are supportive with the stock trading above key moving averages, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings. The latest earnings call showed progress and strategic momentum, but revenue softness and cost pressure, plus mixed corporate developments, temper the upside.

To see Spark’s full report on KOPN stock, click here.

More about Kopin

Average Trading Volume: 2,722,033

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $351.4M

For a thorough assessment of KOPN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Horizon Petroleum Raises Up to $3 Million via New Convertible Debenture Offering
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Horizon Petroleum ( (TSE:HPL) ) is now available.

Horizon Petroleum Ltd. has launched a private placement of up to $3 million in secured convertible debentures, priced at $1,000 each, bearing 7% interest and maturing 24 months after closing, anticipated on or before April 15, 2026. The debentures are convertible into common shares and warrants, will rank behind three existing series of debentures, and remain subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval and a four-month hold period.

Proceeds from the financing will fund civil works for the planned re-entry of the Lachowice 7 gas well in southern Poland, provide working capital for operations in Poland and Canada, and repay existing liabilities. Certain directors and officers are expected to participate under related-party transaction exemptions, and the deal, which may include finder fees of up to 7% in cash and 7% in warrants, underscores investor interest in Horizon’s European gas strategy and its Lachowice development program.

More about Horizon Petroleum

Horizon Petroleum Ltd. is a Calgary-based energy company focused on the appraisal and development of conventional oil and natural gas resources in Europe. The company holds two concessions in Poland with significant undeveloped gas discoveries, and its initial development priority is the Lachowice gas field in the Bielska-Biala concession, supported by a management team with extensive international oil and gas experience.

Average Trading Volume: 146,214

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$5.24M

data.title: Philogen posts record 2025 profit on RayzeBio deal, plans dividend and R&D push
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Philogen SpA ( (IT:PHIL) ) is now available.

Philogen reported record 2025 results, with net profit surging to €229.7 million and revenue from contracts with customers jumping more than fourfold to €314.3 million, largely driven by a major upfront payment from a licensing deal with Bristol Myers Squibb’s RayzeBio unit for a prostate cancer candidate. The group’s EBITDA expanded to €261.6 million, its net financial position turned strongly positive at €368.3 million, and the board will propose allocating 2025 profit to a non-distributable reserve while funding a €0.70 per-share dividend from existing reserves, alongside seeking shareholder approval for its remuneration report and a new treasury share buyback authorization.

Management signalled that the strengthened balance sheet will support broader R&D and manufacturing investment, including seven new potentially registration-enabling studies by 2027 and multiple Phase I trials, underlining Philogen’s ambition to accelerate its pipeline toward commercialisation despite the absence of marketed products. The company is also expanding its artificial intelligence capabilities to boost operational efficiency and drug discovery, a move that could enhance its competitive position in biotech partnering as it continues to monetise its discovery platforms through high-value licensing agreements.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:PHIL) stock is a Buy with a EUR24.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Philogen SpA stock, see the IT:PHIL Stock Forecast page.

More about Philogen SpA

Philogen S.p.A. is an Italian biotechnology group, together with its Swiss subsidiary Philochem AG, focused on discovering and developing antibody-based drugs and small organic molecules, particularly in oncology. Operating without products yet on the market, it generates revenue mainly from upfront payments, milestones and collaboration agreements with larger pharmaceutical partners, alongside contract research and manufacturing services.

Average Trading Volume: 17,818

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €643.3M

See more insights into PHIL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Odfjell SE ( (GB:0J77) ) just unveiled an update.

Odfjell SE has published its 2025 annual report, highlighting solid financial results and operational performance in a year characterized by softer markets and geopolitical volatility. CEO Harald Fotland said the year underscored the strength of the company’s people and business model, emphasizing that responsible operations, team expertise, and long-term strategic choices continue to support Odfjell’s resilience and forward momentum.

The report package includes full financial statements for Odfjell Group and Odfjell SE, the Board of Directors’ report with a sustainability statement, and business reviews for Odfjell Tankers, Ship Management, and Odfjell Terminals. More about Odfjell SE

Odfjell SE is a leading global provider of seaborne transportation and storage of chemicals and other specialty bulk liquids, operating a fleet of around 70 ships serving both global and regional trades. The group also runs four strategically located tank terminals at major international shipping hubs, employs about 2,300 staff worldwide, and is headquartered in Bergen, Norway, with offices in 12 locations and 2025 gross revenue of USD 1,115 million.

data.title: Jushi Refinances Debt With $160 Million Term Loan, Bolstering Cash and Balance Sheet
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jushi Holdings ( (TSE:JUSH) ) has shared an update.

Jushi Holdings Inc. has refinanced its former first and second lien credit facilities with a new US$160 million senior secured term loan led by funds managed by FocusGrowth Asset Management, providing non-dilutive financing that matures in three years and carries a 12.5% annual interest rate. Following the refinancing, Jushi reports approximately US$35 million in cash, with the transaction structured as a non-amortizing facility secured by first-priority liens on certain company and subsidiary assets.

The term loan includes significant participation from CEO and founder James Cacioppo and major shareholder Denis Arsenault, making it a related party transaction under Canadian securities rules, though exemptions from formal valuation and minority approval requirements were used and the deal was vetted by an independent special committee. Jushi also announced it will report its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on March 31, 2026, offering investors an upcoming opportunity to assess the impact of the strengthened balance sheet and revised capital structure on the company’s performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:JUSH) stock is a Hold with a C$0.81 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jushi Holdings stock, see the TSE:JUSH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JUSH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JUSH is a Neutral.

Jushi Holdings’ overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, particularly in profitability and leverage, which are the most impactful factors. While there are positive signs in revenue growth and operational improvements, these are counterbalanced by increased net losses and valuation concerns. Technical indicators suggest a neutral market sentiment, and regulatory uncertainties add further risk.

To see Spark’s full report on JUSH stock, click here.

More about Jushi Holdings

Jushi Holdings Inc. is a vertically integrated, multi-state cannabis company focused on building a portfolio of branded cannabis assets across the U.S. through acquisitions, distressed workouts and competitive license applications. The company targets the full cannabis value chain, aiming to maximize shareholder value while delivering high-quality products across the cannabis ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 72,051

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$118M

Opawica Explorations ( (TSE:OPW) ) has issued an update.

Opawica Explorations Inc. has appointed its current chief financial officer, Monty Sutton, to the board of directors, effective March 25, 2026. Sutton brings more than 35 years of public markets, governance, administration and accounting experience, reinforcing the company’s leadership bench as it advances exploration efforts in Quebec’s Abitibi Gold Belt.

The company also noted that an independent Qualified Person has reviewed and approved the scientific and technical information supporting its exploration activities. This validation underscores Opawica’s adherence to regulatory standards as it pursues the conceptual mineral targets on its properties, which remain at an early, non-resource-defined stage.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:OPW) stock is a Sell with a C$0.12 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Opawica Explorations stock, see the TSE:OPW Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OPW is a Neutral.
